```markdown
---
layout: cv
title: Ryan Black's CV
---

# Ryan Black
Computer Science Student | Aspiring Software Developer | Data Science Enthusiast

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mailto:ryan.burge.black@gmail.com">ryan.burge.black@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/ryanblack02">GitHub Profile</a>
</div>

## Currently

Computer Science student at Brigham Young University–Idaho with experience in software development, data analysis, and collaborative programming projects. Passionate about building interactive applications, solving challenging programming problems, and expanding my knowledge of data science and machine learning.

### Technical Skills

**Programming Languages**

- Python
- R
- SQL
- JavaScript
- HTML
- CSS

**Tools & Technologies**

- Git
- GitHub
- Visual Studio Code
- Quarto
- Streamlit
- Polars
- Microsoft Office

### Areas of Interest

Software Engineering, Data Science, Machine Learning, Web Development, Data Visualization, Object-Oriented Programming

## Education

`Expected Graduation: Winter 2028`

__Brigham Young University–Idaho__

Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

Relevant Coursework:

- Software Engineering
- Data Science Programming
- Database Systems
- Web Development
- Statistics
- Data Structures

## Projects

### Keyboard Jumper: Hardcore Mode

Developing a browser-based typing game using JavaScript and object-oriented programming principles. The project features multiple difficulty levels, performance statistics, adaptive gameplay mechanics, responsive design, and an engaging arcade-inspired user experience.

### Animal Word Search

Designed and developed an interactive browser-based word search game using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features include dynamically generated puzzles, multiple animal categories, adjustable difficulty levels, drag-to-select gameplay, accessibility enhancements, and responsive design.

### FSU Boosters Dashboard

Collaborated with the BYU–Idaho Data Science Society on a team-based analytics project using R, Quarto, GitHub, and data visualization techniques to explore university booster data and communicate insights.

## Professional Experience

`May 2024 – August 2024`

__Unit Healthcare, Inc.__

- Assisted with daily operational responsibilities in a professional healthcare environment.
- Collaborated effectively with coworkers while maintaining accuracy and organization.
- Strengthened communication, teamwork, and time-management skills.

`2022 – 2024`

__Uber Eats Delivery Driver__

- Managed deliveries independently while providing excellent customer service.
- Demonstrated reliability, organization, and strong time-management skills.
- Adapted quickly to changing routes and customer needs while maintaining efficiency.

## Leadership & Activities

### BYU–Idaho Data Science Society

Participated in collaborative data science projects using GitHub, R, Quarto, and modern software development workflows.

## Strengths

- Analytical problem solving
- Attention to detail
- Independent learner
- Collaborative team member
- Software design and development
- Version control using Git and GitHub

<!-- Last updated: July 2026 -->
```
